paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 20, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the recent news including an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which will be hosted on August 13, 2026, as reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and 8-K filings on July 15, July 13, and July 9, 2026, which disclose various corporate actions, including the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of a director.
